productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Navy Blue Jacket
description: Composition Navy blue sleeveless puffer jacket with the shell and lining made of 100% polyester and trim fabric made of 97% polyester and 3% elastane, has a mock collar with ribbing, a concealed zippered front placket, two pockets with ribbed openings, appliquéd branding on left chest, stitch detailing, and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, iron or wring Dry in shade This jacket from united colors of benetton for women is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with form fitting jeans, a fitted tee and ankle high boots. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
